message:
Parallelize API key validation on startup (#10062)

ValidateAllKeys previously validated each provider sequentially, with
a 10-second timeout per provider. With 14 configured providers this
could delay startup by over 2 minutes.

Now validations run concurrently using goroutines bounded by a
semaphore (max 5 concurrent). A mutex protects the shared
ConfigManager calls. Named constants replace all magic numbers.

Fixes #10059

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
